---
title: "Movies"
author: "Var Kurapati"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
movies <- read_csv("data/rotten_tomatoes_movies.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| cache: true
movies_long <- movies |>
  separate_longer_delim(genre, delim = ", ") |>
  filter(!is.na(genre), genre != "")
```

```{r}
movies_gap <- movies |>
  mutate(gap = tomatoMeter - audienceScore) |>
  filter(!is.na(gap))
```

````{r}
gap_by_genre <- movies_gap |>
  separate_longer_delim(genre, delim = ", ") |>
  filter(!is.na(genre), genre != "") |>
  group_by(genre) |>
  summarise(
    mean_gap = mean(gap, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  ) |>
  filter(n >= 50) |>
  arrange(mean_gap)
````

```{r}
gap_by_genre |>
  ggplot(aes(x = mean_gap, y = fct_reorder(genre, mean_gap), fill = mean_gap > 0)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2196F3", "FALSE" = "#F44336"),
                    labels = c("TRUE" = "Critics favor", "FALSE" = "Audiences favor")) +
  labs(
    title = "Average critic vs. audience score gap by genre",
    subtitle = "Positive = critics rate higher; negative = audiences rate higher",
    x = "Mean gap (tomatoMeter - audienceScore)",
    y = NULL,
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
